data.title: Donaldson Company (NYSE: DCI) declares $0.30 per share cash dividend payable on August 27, 2025. 29 years of consecutive dividend increases.
data.description: In Minneapolis, Donaldson Company, Inc. (NYSE: DCI) declared a standard cash dividend of 30.0 cents per share. This dividend will be distributed on August 27, 2025, to shareholders documented by August 12, 2025. Donaldson is part of the S&P High-Yield Dividend Aristocrats Index and has increased its annual dividend for 29 years, with the 2024 calendar year being the latest. The company has provided a cash dividend consistently every quarter for an impressive 69 years.

data.title: Cathie Wood's ARKK ETF surged 400% in 2020 but dropped 80% in 2021. Now up 50% in 3 months, outperforming S&P 500.
data.description: In 2020, Cathie Wood's Ark Innovation ETF (NYSE: ARKK) saw a significant increase, surging by almost 400% from its March 2020 lows due to the pandemic-induced market boom. However, in February 2021, as inflation rose and interest rates increased, ARKK plummeted by nearly 80% from its peak, impacted by decreasing valuations and declining demand for unprofitable growth stocks. Despite currently standing 50% lower than its February 2021 high, recent trends indicate a potential shift. ARKK has surged by 50% in the last three months, the most substantial rally since 2021, nearly doubling the performance of the S&P 500, represented by the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF (NYSE: VOO), during the same period. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: VCI Global launches SecureGPU™, the first encrypted AI compute server for defense applications, piloting across Southeast Asia.
data.description: A significant milestone has been achieved by SecureGPU™ in establishing a zero-trust AI infrastructure, with the platform now undergoing pilot testing in various countries across Southeast Asia. This development showcases groundbreaking progress in enhancing AI security measures. The pilot program is currently being conducted in multiple areas within Southeast Asia, with an emphasis on validating the effectiveness and reliability of the technology in diverse settings. This advancement represents a crucial step forward in fortifying AI environments against potential threats and vulnerabilities.

data.title: Hubbell Incorporated announces quarterly dividend of $1.32 per share, payable on September 15, 2025, to shareholders on record August 29, 2025.
data.description: In Shelton, Connecticut on July 25, 2025, the Board of Directors of Hubbell Incorporated (NYSE:HUBB) announced a quarterly dividend of $1.32 per share for the Company’s common stock. Shareholders of record on August 29, 2025, will receive the dividend payment on September 15, 2025.

data.title: JD Martin appoints Adam Hayes as Regional VP for Georgia and Alabama. Hayes will lead strategic growth in the region.
data.description: In Atlanta on July 25, 2025, JD Martin announced the appointment of Adam Hayes as the Regional Vice President overseeing operations in Georgia and Alabama. In his new position, Adam will focus on boosting strategic growth, broadening market reach, and enhancing customer relationships.

data.title: Modiv Industrial (NYSE: MDV) to report Q2 2025 results on Aug 7, 2025. Conference call at 11:00 AM ET. Live call: 1-800-717-1738.
data.description: In Denver, Modiv Industrial, Inc. (NYSE: MDV), the sole public REIT specializing in acquiring industrial manufacturing real estate, revealed plans to disclose financial outcomes for the quarter concluding on June 30, 2025, prior to market commencement on Thursday, August 7, 2025. The management team is scheduled to conduct a conference call on the same day at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time to deliberate on the results. For the live conference call, dial 1-800-717-1738 or 1-646-307-1865 at 11:00.

data.title: ELIXIR MD, Inc. expands into Mexico through a strategic partnership to launch the innovative ELIXIR MD™ Device.
data.description: On July 22, 2025, ELIXIR MD, Inc., an innovative company specializing in advanced aesthetic non-invasive medical technology and treatment protocols, revealed their expansion into Mexico. This move marks a significant milestone in the company's global growth strategy. The initiative to enter the Mexican market is expected to boost ELIXIR MD's presence worldwide.

data.title: Investor cautions against BTC, gold, and silver ETFs due to fraudulent claims; ETF analysts believe fear is unwarranted.
data.description: A warning was issued by an investor regarding deceptive paper claims related to tangible assets. However, analysts specializing in Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs) informed Cointelegraph that the concerns are without merit.
